history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man, likely in his late teens or early twenties, stands leaning against a grey wall. He is wearing a white t-shirt with a graphic print featuring the words "LU BRAND" in red, accompanied by a stylized American flag and the text "PERSONAL PLEASURE" below it. He has on dark, distressed denim jeans that are cuffed at the bottom and black flip-flops. The man is wearing dark, rectangular sunglasses that obscure his eyes, and his right hand is covering his mouth, giving him a somewhat secretive or thoughtful expression. He is also wearing a black backpack.

The background features a modern industrial-style staircase with metal treads and railings, and rope accents. Behind the man, there's a reflective surface, possibly glass or polished metal, with vertical lighting strips creating a bright, somewhat futuristic glow. The overall lighting is a mix of cool ambient light from the background and softer light on the man, creating a slight contrast. The color palette is dominated by greys, whites, and blacks, with a touch of red in the t-shirt graphic. The mood is casual and slightly edgy, with a hint of mystery due to the obscured face. The image has a slightly grainy, candid feel, as if captured in a moment.
